messages.text: Hey — just following up on those shifts you were rostered for at Kallan's on Sunday (the 15th). Looks like you didn't clock in for either of them — the 15:00–21:00 and then the 21:00–09:00. Did you end up working those, or did something come up? Need to get this sorted today if you can

So the incident report from Tuesday at Kallan's — I've got it down as Entry #342 but NDIS needs way more detail than "Behaviour of Concern / Non-Compliance with House Rules". Can you add some actual notes on what happened? Also need to know who you told after — like did you call the family or guardian? Ideally that should happen within 30 mins of your shift ending anyway.

Just get back to me on that when you can today?

Just following up on a couple things from Thursday at Kallan's — you clocked in at 18:37 but your shift was meant to start at 15:00. What happened there? Were you running late or was there something else going on?

Also heads up, you didn't manually clock out so the system auto-closed it at 21:10. Just make sure you're clocking yourself out at the end of your shifts going forward, yeah?

Your shift amendment's pending on our end so we'll get back to you on that once we've reviewed it 👍

So just following up on something — I'm seeing you clocked 6.4 hours across your shifts this period but you were only rostered for 5 hours. Are those extra hours all approved? Need to make sure before we bill anything out.

Also got your shift amendment notes from Nada Haliem's on the 22nd — they're in the system and pending review on our end. Nothing else you need to do there 👍

Hey — just following up on Saturday at Kallan's. This one's come up before, so want to make sure we get it sorted this time. You were down for 15:00–21:00 but we've got no record of you clocking in at all. Did that shift end up happening? Also the system auto-closed at 15:10, so if you did work it just make sure you're manually clocking out from now on. And heads up — your shift amendment came through and the notes are in, just pending review on our end. Can you get back to me today on the clock-in thing?

Yeah so a couple things from the recent shifts — Evan clocked out at 11:16 on Saturday the 20th but was down for til 2, do you know what happened there? Early finish or something?

Also Joshua clocked in at 10:25 on Monday the 22nd but there's nothing on the roster for that time — did he actually work that one?

Can you get back to me on those today when you get a sec?

Hey — just following up on a couple of things from your recent shifts. I know this one's come up before, so want to make sure we get it sorted this time.

You didn't clock in for either of your shifts at Kallan's on Monday (22nd) — the 09:00–15:00 and the 15:00–21:00. Did you work both of those? Need you to clock in for every shift so we've got it on record.

Also, that incident report from Wednesday at Kallan's just says "Training cancelled" but NDIS needs way more detail about what actually happened. And I need to know who you notified (guardian, family, whoever). Can you fill that in today?

Just reply when you get a chance.

Hey Abdul — just following up on a few things from your recent shifts at Evan's.

First up, those incident reports from Thursday and Friday still need proper notes in them — NDIS needs the details about what happened, who was there, all that. These need to go in within 30 mins of the shift ending so we can process them properly. Can you add those in when you get a chance?

Also, you clocked in 79 mins late on Sunday (scheduled 9am, showed up at 10:18) — what happened there?

And just checking — your amendment request from Tuesday the 23rd came through and your notes are pending review now, so no action needed from you on that one 👍

Let me know when you've sorted the incident reports and we can chat through the rest

Just caught a couple of things from your recent shifts — can we sort them out?

First up, on Saturday the 20th, the system auto-clocked you out at 15:10, but there's no manual clock-out on file. Did you forget to clock out that day, or did something happen?

Also flagging that this period you've clocked 10 hours but were only rostered for 5 — that's a 5-hour difference. Can you double-check that all those extra hours got approved? Just need to verify before we bill.

And FYI, we've got your amendment request for the 20th — notes came through fine, just sitting in the queue for our review. You're all set on your end.

Can you get back to me when you've got a sec today?

Hi Ikram,

Just flagging something from your roster — Xavier Putchakayla on Thursday 18th June (17:00–21:00 shift) never clocked in. Can you let me know what happened there?

Hi Ahmed,

Just flagging a couple of things from your shift at Joshua Gatt's on Saturday:

The system auto clock-out kicked in at 14:10 since you didn't manually clock out — just so you know for next time, make sure to do that before you leave.

Also got your shift amendment request and we've got your notes. They're pending review on our end, so nothing you need to do — we'll sort it and let you know.
